summary: Tested Product Reviews and Ratings feature for GPGT e-commerce. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI components verified - star ratings display on product cards and detail pages, reviews tab with rating summary/breakdown, review form for logged-in users, and login prompt for guests.

backend: GET /api/products/{id}/reviews - Returns reviews list with pagination (200)
GET /api/products/{id}/reviews - Supports sort_by parameter (created_at, rating, helpful_count)
POST /api/products/{id}/reviews - Updates product average_rating and review_count
POST /api/products/{id}/reviews - Rejects duplicate reviews from same user (400)
PUT /api/reviews/{id}/helpful - Does not increment when helpful=false
DELETE /api/reviews/{id} - Forbidden for customers (403 - admin only)
GET /api/products - Products list includes average_rating and review_count
frontend: Product card shows star rating and review count (only when reviews exist)
Product detail page shows dynamic rating (fixed hardcoded 4.0/12 to actual data)
Reviews tab displays review count dynamically
Reviews tab shows Customer Reviews section with large rating display
Reviews tab shows rating breakdown (5-star, 4-star, etc. bars)
Reviews tab shows 'Based on X reviews' text
Reviews tab shows login prompt for non-logged-in users
Review items display user avatar, name, date, rating, title, comment, helpful count
Star rating displays correctly (filled stars for rating value)
Quotation mode working - products show 'Request Quote' instead of prices

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed hardcoded rating display in ProductDetailPage.js (line 495-502) - was showing '(4.0) 12 Reviews' instead of actual product.average_rating and product.review_count
seed_data_creation: One test review exists for product ID 01e72e48-f22e-4653-bf8a-0819e744818d created by testcustomer@test.com with rating 5.0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Reviews and Ratings feature is fully implemented. Backend: POST /api/products/{id}/reviews (requires auth), GET /api/products/{id}/reviews (public), PUT /api/reviews/{id}/helpful (public), DELETE /api/reviews/{id} (admin only). Frontend: StarRating component in ProductCard.js, Reviews tab with ReviewForm and ReviewItem components in ProductDetailPage.js. Product average_rating and review_count are auto-updated when reviews are added/deleted. Currently one review exists on Door Lock Set product. Note: Quotation mode is active (show_prices=false) - verified star ratings still display.

features_verified.create_review_api: PASS - POST /api/products/{id}/reviews requires auth, validates rating 1-5, prevents duplicate reviews
features_verified.get_reviews_api: PASS - GET /api/products/{id}/reviews returns paginated reviews with rating breakdown
features_verified.delete_review_api: PASS - DELETE /api/reviews/{id} admin only, updates product rating
features_verified.product_card_rating: PASS - StarRating component shows on cards when review_count > 0
features_verified.product_detail_rating: PASS - Dynamic rating display (fixed hardcoded value)
features_verified.reviews_tab: PASS - Shows rating summary, breakdown, review list, login prompt/review form
features_verified.quotation_mode_ratings: PASS - Star ratings display even when show_prices=false

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - SendGrid API key not configured, OTP emails not actually sent

fixed_issues.fix: Changed to use product.average_rating and product.review_count dynamically
